description: Dotcom-Monitor for me was easy to set up because of the step-by-step guide the software provided & helped me a lot in performance evaluation of my web server.
author: Lusanda Geraldine V.
pros: The ability to properly monitor the performance of my entire network and an incredible helpful tool.
cons: More quota's can be offered by Dotcom-Monitor.

review_title: dotcom-monitor has grown and evolved since the last time I used it to include some cool features
author: Gabriel L.
pros: Initially, I used this product solely for uptime monitoring but it now offers so much more!
cons: For now my only blocker is price, and this is only because I only use a small subset of their tools (uptime monitoring)
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Easy setup - allows you to monitor all your API and sites in minutes
author: Justin H.
pros: Cloud tool which is easy to setup and easy to use to monitor all of our external websites and our APIs.
cons: Expensive for what you get and can be done in house with a multitude of open source tools.

author: Eric R.
pros: The software does what it needs to do very well. The variable types of checks from numerous locations is very beneficial.
cons: The price of the service has gotten disproportionate to its value. As such I was forced to another tool that might not be as feature packed but gets the job done at a price I can afford.

review_title: Excellent Website Monitoring Service – Highly Recommended!
description: My experience with Dotcom-Monitor has been outstanding. The platform is easy to use, and the insights provided have helped us significantly improve our website's reliability and performance. With real-time monitoring, we can quickly address any issues before they impact users. It’s truly a must-have for any business serious about maintaining top-notch website performance.
author: Tomer C.
pros: I absolutely love the comprehensive monitoring services Dotcom-Monitor provides. The real-time alerts and detailed performance analytics have been a game-changer for our website's uptime and speed. The global monitoring feature ensures that our site is optimized everywhere, and the intuitive dashboard makes it easy to track performance. Their customer support is exceptional – always responsive and efficient.
cons: There’s not much to complain about. If I had to pick something, I’d say the pricing could be a bit high for smaller businesses, but the value you get definitely justifies the cost.

review_title: Bang for your Buck Allrounder Software
description: One of the easiest and cheapest website monitoring tool out there which gets all the job done
author: P S A.
pros: User Interface and the freebies it provides is out of this world. Huge value
cons: We have reported slow response times or limited support options, especially on lower-tier plans. So maybe that is something that is intended or I am not sure but this software is a great pick

review_title: Superb tool to monitor your websites and network.
description: A great tool to monitor your websites ad APIs and good for network diag0nostics.
author: Rizwan Q.
pros: Easy to set up and easy to use and excellent site testing.
cons: Little bit expensive with some limitations.

description: My overall experience with Dotcom-monitor was pretty good
author: James S.
pros: I love how i can monitor everyone on the network
cons: Its pretty expensive and it would be nice if it was cheaper

description: I have been using it since 2023 and found it beneficial
author: Wajahat R.
pros: Its a user friendly and job is being done smoothly
cons: Pricing should be a bit less than what they offer

description: Amazing experience and recommended for everyone.
author: Ashutosh T.
pros: Finest monitor I have ever worked with. What an amazing quality.
cons: Smooth operations and fine texture. What an amazing quality.

description: Mostly positive experiences, just need to eliminate false positives.
author: Mike D.
pros: Ease to get up an running, was up less than an hour
cons: Would like to see an option to allow me to select which source servers are monitoring my servers. Any server outside of the U.S.A will create false positives due to my GeoFilter rules applied. This cause my uptime status to be misleading.

author: Shirin R.
pros: Recently, upon joining the company, I initiated the use of Dotcom-Monitor for load testing our web-based software. I have been thoroughly impressed with the level of detail and comprehensiveness of the reports generated by the software. Moreover, the support team at Dotcom-Monitor has exceeded my expectations, particularly an engineer named Egor, who has been an incredible help to me. On almost a daily basis, I reach out to him with various questions and he has consistently demonstrated unwavering patience in addressing all of my inquiries, providing detailed and insightful answers. His level of expertise and professionalism has been invaluable in ensuring that our load testing process runs smoothly and effectively.
cons: I think, there is less information about some part specially errors that in my idea can be better.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It's our one-stop shop for all our monitoring needs.
author: Thomas S.
pros: Dotcom-Monitor is a very feature rich solution with a lot to offer. I predominantly use the BrowserView to manage an maintain the performance of our web properties and ServerView to monitor uptime and be notified of outages.
cons: There’s no doubt that Dotcom Monitor has a lot of layers to offer, which can make it seem a little complex at first. However it is easy to get started.

description: This is a reliable tool which really helped us to monitor and make the necessary adjustments in order to get the best webpage speeds for our platform.
author: Ema B.
pros: Easy to use and reflects the webpage speeds across the Globe pretty good. Really like that with one click you can test your webpage speeds on more than 20 servers at once.
cons: For what we use this tool, there are no concerns.

author: Jay D.
pros: Checks the Uptime of a website every 5 mins from different server locations
cons: Should provide a live update instead of every 5 mins as this makes a big difference in terms of customer experience. Also, I don't prefer the REST API call to be made from ServiceNow, would prefer a direct integration instead for a quicker configuration, if additional websites need to be tracked using the same tool.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: We used Dotcom Monitor for a short time
description: Joining Dotcom-Monitor was easy and the experience was great as they fulfilled our monitoring needs.
author: Laura G.
pros: We needed our website to be monitored for a short period, so we used it for a couple months. The reports came straight to our inbox and gave us timely notice of when our website was down or not preforming well.
cons: We only needed the product for a short period.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool and easy to use
description: Good but lack of features stered Us away from this app
author: Emir O.
pros: Easy to Use, i set up everything in 10 minutes with KK manual or tutorial needed
cons: Lack of functions. I needed to deploy this utility to 20 computer and collect data remotely. Could not do that with this tool.

review_title: Good. Lots of data, more than I could access elsewhere.
description: full performance overview of our online presence
author: Buffy B.
pros: All of the different reports I can pull using different sets of data. Other programs didn't offer everything I needed.
cons: Pay as you go is nice to have, but i also miss just putting in a credit card and doing what I need to do and then looking at the bill at the end of the month.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jesse G.
pros: Robust feature set for testing many aspects of website performance and monitoring.
cons: May need updated devices for performance benchmarks for android and iOS devices.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Dotcom-Monitor allows us to monitor multiple services within one interface and platform. Its allowed us to operate more efficient.
author: Gregory S.
pros: One of Dotcom's best feature is the push/pull API capabilities that provides us with network performances. We use this to monitor for performance issues as well as page loading stats.
cons: The set-up process is a learning curve. It would be nice to have a similar interface for set-up and maintenance.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: When we used it to troubleshoot why our website was given an error, we were totally blown away by the diagnosis by the software.
author: Shadreck V.
pros: We used it to test one of our websites that was giving some sort of 503 error, and we were please at specific detailed info the system generated about the possible problems from our server
cons: There was nothing we could find wrong with the software, though we though we needed to learn more about the software ourselves.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Nipun A.
pros: I liked the simplistic UI a lot. Plus the feature provided in free trial solves most of the load testing and api monitoring issues. The results looked really accurate too.
cons: Some services were missing. There could be more quota offered
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Very good , like the certificate check
author: Nir Z.
pros: Certificate check / expiration with notification
cons: Different notification for the almost expired certificate

author: Ilan K.
pros: The flexibility and ease of use that the dashboard provides.
cons: Didn’t find any meaningful Downsides so far.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Eric F.
pros: Software is easy to navigate and use. Web version is very good. I like that you can edit the script after recording.
cons: The non-web, client version gui looks out of date.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial
